title: Higher education student enrolments UK: 2023 to 2024
body: "The Higher Education Statistics Agency (HESA) produce these statistics on student enrolments and qualifications obtained by higher education (HE) students at HE providers in the UK.  Information is available on:   undergraduate and postgraduate study full-time and part-time study country of domicile subject area demographics and disadvantage degree classifications   Earlier higher education student statistics bulletins are available on the HESA website.  "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
